summary: Phase 2.5-b workspace tooling: pnpm workspaces + Turborepo skeleton; private scaffold package.json members; workspace:baseline documented; legacy web/ npm workflow verified (577 tests); no landing/demo runtime files.

mappings.criterion: Workspace configuration recognizes top-level apps/* and packages/* without requiring runtime code to move.
Existing web/ build/test workflow still passes from its current location.
Empty or README-only product/package folders do not publish packages or create fake imports.
Document the command developers should run to validate the workspace baseline.
No shared package extraction or landing/demo implementation is included.

recommendations: Wire pnpm workspace:baseline into CI in the 2.5-d infra slice; pr.yml still uses npm ci in web/ only.
Merge review-added contract tests into implementation artifact testsAdded on next executor refresh.

maintainabilityFindings.description: Review added 3 contract tests so acceptance criteria map to pytest nodes for validate gate.
